channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: RJ Scaringe secures $12 billion in funding across three ventures, continuing to attract investor interest
item.description: RJ Scaringe, the founder of Rivian and serial entrepreneur, has raised over $12.3 billion from venture capital, strategic, and institutional investors across three startups. His newest venture, Mind R...

item.title: Trump Calls New York Times Reporter Treasonous During Press Briefing
item.description: During a press briefing aboard Air Force One on May 15, 2026, President Donald Trump accused New York Times reporter David Sanger of committing treason following a question about the ongoing war with ...

item.title: David Beckham achieves billionaire status through football investments and fashion business
item.description: David Beckham, di former England football captain, don reach one big milestone: him don become Britain’s first billionaire sportsperson, according to di 2026 Sunday Times Rich List. Him and him wife, ...

item.title: Manitoba faces heightened wildfire risk as dry weather persists
item.description: Manitoba is experiencing an elevated risk of wildfires as dry conditions persist across the province. Officials are warning residents to remain vigilant, particularly in rural and forested areas, wher...

item.title: Labour Faces Crucial Leadership Choice Ahead of UK General Election
item.description: Labour is confronting a critical moment following its disappointing performance in the May elections across England, Scotland, and Wales. Jonathan Freedland argues that the party must select a leader ...

item.title: Investors urge Albanese government to restrict capital gains tax changes to property flipping only
item.description: According to an analysis of Australian Taxation Office data by AFR Weekend, less than 40 per cent of capital gains earned by individuals in Australia come from property. In contrast, more than 60 per ...

item.title: Three Indigenous Tourism Organizations Withdraw from ITAC Over Financial and Governance Issues
item.description: Three provincial Indigenous tourism organizations — Indigenous Tourism Ontario (ITO), Indigenous Tourism B.C. (ITBC), and Nova Scotia Indigenous Tourism Enterprise Network (NSITEN) — have formally ann...

item.title: Punjab government allows markets and shops to remain open until further notice till June 1
item.description: LAHORE: The Punjab government has decided to temporarily lift the earlier restrictions on market and shop closing timings, responding to protests from traders, shopping mall associations, and the gene...

item.title: NEMA confirms website breach, urges public to ignore false information
item.description: The National Emergency Management Agency (NEMA) don alert say unauthorised persons don gain access to their official website. NEMA dey carry out all necessary technical actions to fix the breach, secu...

item.title: Meru Girl to Receive Urgent Treatment for Rare Reproductive Condition at KNH
item.description: Abigael Kendi, a 19-year-old girl from Meru, has suffered for over ten years due to a rare medical condition involving two vaginas and wombs, combined with endometriosis, which causes extremely painfu...

item.title: Individual charged following leak of referee's personal information during Motherwell v Celtic match
item.description: Access to the full news article was blocked, displaying only a server error message indicating that permission to view the page was denied. The headline suggests that a man has been charged in connect...

item.title: Kaduna Police Arrest 10 Suspected Bandits, Recover Eight Firearms Including AK-47 Rifles in Intelligence Operations
item.description: Operatives of the Kaduna State Police Command have successfully arrested 10 suspected bandits in different intelligence-led operations across the state. The police recovered eight firearms, including ...

item.title: House Speaker Johnson declines to call for action on Rep. Max Miller's abuse allegations
item.description: House Speaker Mike Johnson responded to recent domestic abuse allegations against Republican Rep. Max Miller by stating that he does not involve himself in the personal lives of members of Congress. M...

item.title: Strengthening Public-Private Partnerships to Improve Water Supply in Tanzania
item.description: Tanzania is facing serious challenges in providing clean and safe water to its population, and stakeholders say that public-private partnerships (PPPs) are essential to meet Vision 2050 targets. Exper...

item.title: Cadex Defence says its rifles reached Russia through unauthorized diversion despite sanctions
item.description: A Quebec-based firearms manufacturer, Cadex Defence, says an internal investigation has confirmed that some of its rifles ended up in Russia through fraudulent diversion, without the company’s knowled...

item.title: PM Modi Visits Amsterdam to Strengthen Trade, Clean Energy, and Bilateral Ties
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi has reached Amsterdam for a two-day official visit, following his recent trip to the United Arab Emirates. The visit, taking place from May 15 to 17, 2026, is aimed at str...

item.title: Illegal Wildlife Trade in the Himalayas Poses Serious Threat to Biodiversity and Local Communities
item.description: A recent study highlights a worrying surge in illegal wildlife trade across the Hindu Kush Himalaya, spanning eight countries including India, China, Nepal, and Bhutan. The trade has reportedly double...

item.title: Tanzania Focuses on Ports, Energy and Industrial Zones to Attract Investment at GAIS
item.description: Tanzania don highlight some key sectors dem wan push to attract both private and institutional capital using the Global Africa Investment Summit (GAIS). Di country dey focus on ports, logistics, energ...

item.title: Ndindi Nyoro Urges Government to Cut Taxes and Levies to Lower Fuel Prices
item.description: Nairobi — Kiharu MP Ndindi Nyoro has called for immediate government action to reduce fuel prices, following the Energy and Petroleum Regulatory Authority's (EPRA) announcement of significant price hi...

item.title: Colorado Governor Jared Polis commutes Tina Peters’ sentence, drawing criticism from fellow Democrats
item.description: Colorado Governor Jared Polis reduced the prison sentence of former county clerk Tina Peters, a figure associated with election denial claims, from nine years to four and a half years. The commutation...
